title: Toppr is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Toppr is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Toppr, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Toppr:
Toppr is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Toppr!
